citation.description: Normalize step maps skipped/empty via scripts/normalize_ci_conclusion.sh, then feeds steps.normalize.outputs.vote-type to gerrit-review-action instead of raw WORKFLOW_CONCLUSION; vote-type is always in {success,failure,cancelled}

criteria.criterion: The `cast Verified` step handles a `skipped`/unexpected `WORKFLOW_CONCLUSION` without leaving the change voteless — it re-resolves or maps unexpected values to a safe, actionable outcome, never a bare exit-1 that posts nothing.

citation.description: vote.needs lists ALL gating jobs so they are terminal before im-open/workflow-conclusion runs; FAILURE_OBSERVED uses needs.*.result as a fail-closed oracle independent of the raw aggregation value

criteria.criterion: The aggregation is hardened against the terminal-ordering race (needed jobs are guaranteed terminal before the snapshot, or the snapshot ignores `skipped` when successes exist), so `WORKFLOW_CONCLUSION` reflects the real conclusion.

citation.description: test_key_invariant_skipped_never_out_of_domain and test_all_inputs_stay_in_domain cover the skipped path and the full input domain; test_normalization_mapping parametrizes all mapped cases including skipped with and without failure_observed

criteria.criterion: A regression guard (workflow unit/lint or a documented manual check) covers the `skipped`-conclusion path.
